nasb.text: In the twelfth year, in the twelfth month, on the first of the month, the word of the Lord came to me saying,

esv.text: In the twelfth year, in the twelfth month, on the first day of the month, the word of the Lord came to me:

cnv.text: 十二年十二月初一日，耶和華的話臨到我說：

ccb.text: 第十二年十二月一日，耶和华对我说：
